ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observable_objects" (
  "observable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observable object */,
  "observable_type" TEXT /* Type of the observable object (e.g., ObservableObject) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observable object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the observable object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the observable object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the observable object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observable_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_definitions" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., hasChanged, state) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., DatatypeProperty, ObjectProperty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the property represents */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain or namespace of the property definition */,
  "range" TEXT /* Expected range or type of values for the property */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Extended description of the property definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being constrained */,
  "min_count" INTEGER /* Minimum count of values for the property */,
  "max_count" INTEGER /* Maximum count of values for the property */,
  "value_constraints" TEXT /* Value constraints applicable to the property */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint (e.g., cardinality, value) */,
  "constraint_message" TEXT /* Human-readable description of the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_constraints_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_definitions ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_local_types" (
  "local_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local type record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property associated with the local type */,
  "local_type" TEXT /* The local type defined for the property */,
  "local_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the local type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_local_types_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_definitions ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "global_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each global range record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property associated with the global range */,
  "global_range" TEXT /* The global range defined for the property */,
  "range_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the global range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_global_ranges_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_definitions ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data steward, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observable_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "observable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observable object that changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_category" TEXT /* Categorization of the change (e.g., creation, update, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observable_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observable_changes_observable_id FOREIGN KEY ("observable_id") REFERENCES observable_objects ("observable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, data steward) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observable */,
  "observable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observable object accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the access was successful or resulted in an error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observable_id FOREIGN KEY ("observable_id") REFERENCES observable_objects ("observable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property that changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the property */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the property */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change to the property */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Description of why the property was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_definitions ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
